CustomObject.description: Engagement Resolution Engine (ERE) Phase 1 SHADOW LOG. Observe-only, auditable record of every engagement signal (inbound EmailMessage, Event) and how the resolver matched (or failed to match) it to a Lead/Contact/CampaignMember. WRITE TARGET FOR ERE ONLY. The resolver never writes to Lead, Contact, CampaignMember, Event, EmailMessage, or Task. No auto-apply.
CustomObject.label: OA Engagement Resolution
